name: AI Visual
description: Visual detection and region-analysis capability contributions for image and video AI runs.
author: Cove Team

tutorialTopics.title: AI Visual
tutorialTopics.description: Visual embeddings, detections, and similarity search for scenes and images.

slides.title: Find visually related media
slides.caption: AI Visual contributes embeddings and region-analysis claims used by visual similarity and recommendation workflows.
slides.bodyMarkdown: Run visual claims on scenes or images, open similar media from detail pages, and use generated detections as context while reviewing results.
